title: Fatty Velvety Chinese Egg Yangzhou Fried Rice
description: A quick-fix Chinese dish featuring free-range egg and score-fat, this recipe is a diabetic-friendly version of the classic Yangzhou fried rice. It is cooked in a cazuela vessel to achieve the perfect texture.
instructions: Heat the score-fat in a large cazuela vessel over medium heat.
Add the vegetable oil and swirl it around to coat the bottom of the vessel.
Pour in the beaten eggs and scramble them until they are cooked through.
Add the small shrimp and cook until they are pink and fully cooked.
Add the cooked rice to the vessel, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice with the eggs and shrimp for about 5 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
